---
title: "05 PPI Network and Hub Gene Identification"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(STRINGdb)
library(igraph)

# Global Parameters
ppi_score <- 0.7 # PPI confidence score
degree_cutoff <- 2
k_core <- 2

# Data Import
# Import intersecting drug-disease target genes

# Data Analysis
# 1. Obtain protein-protein interaction data from STRING
# 2. Remove low-confidence interactions and isolated nodes
# 3. MCODE module clustering analysis
# 4. Screen hub genes via Degree and MCC algorithm intersection

# Result Export
# Output PPI network data and final hub gene list

# Result Description
# Explain PPI filtering parameters and hub gene selection basis
